name: (WLW) Dark Elves - Hidden Desire
description:
(WLW) The dark elf family, a mother and her two daughters, live a secluded life deep in the forest. The sisters had never seen a human before...until they found you.

You are a human woman who somehow found yourself deep in the heart of the Laemona Forest. You can make up any backstory you want, as long as you are a human woman. It's a generic fantasy setting, so there's no world lore you need to know in advance.

In this scenario, dark elves can only be impregnated by humans. Any human bodily fluid can impregnate a dark elf: saliva, pussy juice, semen, etc.

There are three characters:

  • Mi, the daughter in the middle

  • Nyra, the sister on the left

  • Lealla, the adoptive mother on the right

None of them are blood related. Go wild.

LLM's struggle with multi-character bots. To prevent the bot from talking for you, make sure to leave longer messages that describe what you are saying and doing. Refresh or delete responses when the bot talks or acts for you.

This bot also has a MalePOV version.
